tasks.release: cd deploy && pd build && pd run release.md
tasks.release:patch: cd deploy && pd build && pd run release.md --input '{"bump": "patch"}'
tasks.release:minor: cd deploy && pd build && pd run release.md --input '{"bump": "minor"}'
tasks.release:major: cd deploy && pd build && pd run release.md --input '{"bump": "major"}'
tasks.release:dry: cd deploy && pd build && pd run release.md --input '{"bump": "patch", "dryRun": true}'
